reviews.comment:
Amplia y de acceso un poco complicado ya que hay que dar un rodeo para poder acceder a ella. Cuenta con todos los combustibles y el personal es muy amable.

(Translated by Google)
Spacious but a bit tricky to access, as you have to take a detour to get there. It has all types of fuel and the staff is very friendly.

reviews.comment:
Hacen falta más surtidores. La unica estación de servicio en la zona.Muy lento para despachar y cobrar

(Translated by Google)
More pumps are needed. It's the only gas station in the area. Very slow to pump fuel and pay.

reviews.comment:
como toda estacion de servicio del interior, y un punto turistico como este, estas 1 hora para cargar combustible, la atencion es buena, funciona ok la app de ypf

(Translated by Google)
Like any gas station in the interior, and a tourist spot like this, it takes about an hour to fill up. The service is good, and the YPF app works fine.
